name: LLM Trace → Phoenix
description: Send all LLM input/output traces to Arize Phoenix for observability. View prompts, responses, and token usage in Phoenix UI.

phoenixUrl.description: Phoenix REST API base URL (default: http://localhost:6006)

projectName.description: Phoenix project name to group traces under (default: openclaw)

phoenixUrl.label: Phoenix URL
phoenixUrl.help: Base URL of your Phoenix instance (REST API, same port as the UI)

projectName.label: Project Name
projectName.help: Project name shown in Phoenix UI for grouping traces
